heading: Acquisition of land for facilities
label: 883k Acquisition of land for facilities
text: For fiscal year 1990 and hereafter funds appropriated under this heading shall be available for acquisition of land for facilities.
notes: References in TextFunds appropriated under this heading, referred to in text, refers to funds appropriated under the headings “” and “” of title I, “Department of Commerce”, of the Departments of Commerce, Justice, and State, the Judiciary, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 1990, .National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administrationoperations, research, and facilitiesPub. L. 101–162
